Container.Name: Parson
Container.Overview: Self-hosted, local-first music server and player for your own collection.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Parson web interface and API port.

Config.Name: Application Data
Config.Description: Persistent database, configuration, logs, and recovery snapshots. Must be writable by UID/GID 10001:10001.

Config.Name: Music Library
Config.Description: Host music library. Read-only is recommended; select /music during Parson setup.
